brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI for Secure Patient Communications
Sub-200ms Latency Voice AI with HIPAA and SOC 2 Compliance
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare Providers
One Platform for HIPAA-Ready Voice AI Across 140+ Countries
Secure Patient Conversations with Telnyx Voice AI and SOC 2 Type II
Voice AI Co-Located with Telephony for Under 200ms Latency
Telnyx Owns Network Infrastructure for Compliant Patient Voice AI
HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI Compliant Voice AI Tailored for Healthcare
Reliable Voice AI with 99.999% Uptime for Patient Communications
Global HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI on a Single Platform
descriptions: Deploy voice AI with sub-200ms latency and full HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI compliance on a single platform covering 140+ countries.
Telnyx Voice AI integrates inference co-located with telephony infrastructure, ensuring secure and low-latency patient communications.
Maintain 99.999% uptime with Telnyx’s network-owned platform designed for compliant healthcare voice interactions.
Use a single vendor platform with HIPAA-ready voice AI to streamline patient communication workflows across multiple regions.
Telnyx’s voice AI platform meets HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards while delivering voice services globally with minimal latency.
